title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE BARRIO OF BRAULAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PASSI, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ENRIQUE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4283 / 57 OG No. 13, 2292 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2896, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE BARRIO OF BRAULAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PASSI, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ENRIQUE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrio of Braulan in the Municipality of Passi, Province of Iloilo, is separated from said municipality, and made a part of the Municipality of San Enrique.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
